title: Worked out Example - Inheriting with public

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how **public inheritance** in C++ allows one class to reuse members from another class. The class `Smartphone` inherits from `Device`, gaining access to its methods and variables. The subclass also adds its own specific behavior.

---

**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
Device powered on.
Battery level: 85%
App launched: Camera
```
